case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. WILLIAM J BRAHMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED OCT-21-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
